performance.description: Updated when /daily-report performance (Piece 14, New Relic APM) runs. Used as window start (SINCE) for next run. Not gated by any Trello item yet, not part of Full Run by default.
performance.note: 2026-07-08 14:29: First real report run (ohcleo only, 24h window). apdex 0.91, avg resp 1373ms, error rate 2.14% (650/30431, mostly NotAuthenticated 603 — benign). Found 2 real issues written to reports/2026-07-08/daily-report.md as ALERTS #10-11: (1) django.db.utils.ProgrammingError column app_user.password_reset_code_expires_at does not exist ×6 — likely missing prod DB migration, breaks password reset. (2) 3 core endpoints (MediaRecommendsView/HomeMediasView/MediaByKeyView) averaging 15-21s over hundreds of calls/day — real backend bottleneck, not edge case. MPFC not re-run this pass (ohcleo only requested). Earlier 14:35 note had a future-dated last_run bug (script clamped since-window to 1 min because last_run was ahead of actual now) — corrected here to real current time.

arthur_monitor.description: Updated when /daily-report arthur (Piece 13) runs (manual, on-demand only, no cron). Used as the start time for the next incremental run. IMPORTANT: last_run must equal the actual timestamp through which data was verified/read, NOT the time the feature/command finished running or being built. If a source could not be verified this run (e.g. Slack auth failure), do NOT advance last_run past the last point where ALL 5 sources were verified together — advancing it would silently skip that source's unread window on the next run.
arthur_monitor.note: 2026-07-08 13:45 run: Matrix token finally recovered after a long debugging saga this session (persisted browser-profile session was fine all along — earlier failures were self-inflicted: decrypt-secrets.sh clobbered a working token at ~10:51, then repeated pkill/parallel-script interference against the same tmp/matrix-browser-profile corrupted that session further; a clean single run of matrix-token-refresh.js succeeded immediately). Content: Nam compiling action-item list from msv3-official for Arthur review; Chris sent an unread payment-related image (not yet OCRd); team spent ~12min (12:17-13:33) internally confused about a Chris message re: how Thor integrates with MCP (header vs tool-call-arg) — resolved on their own, deferred the technical change to after the demo per Arthur, no action needed. Technical room: no new messages. Tonight ~23:30 VN is the critical go/no-go call (row 8) — still the main thing to watch.

caveats: Sheets re-run + reviewer-logic correction 14:2x Jul-8 (user requested employee-hours re-run for TODAY, not PREV_DATE): all 5 devs 0h on 07-08 so far, verified both per-dev isolated scans AND unfiltered all-project Workstream dump — day genuinely in progress (14:03), not an alert. LongVV has a PENDING (unapproved) half-day leave request for this morning (father's surgery) — noted, not yet approved so treated as working. Workstream needs-review check: FIRST VERSION WRONG — guessed reviewer=project Manager/Tech Lead role, user corrected (James Diamond→PhucVT not DuongDN, Radio Data Center→LeNH not DuongDN). Real source: `/pinfo/projects/{id}`'s per-member `isReviewer` flag (independent of role). Script fixed to fetch this. Crystal lang further needed a manual override (`REVIEWER_OVERRIDES` map) — system flag itself wrongly shows DuongDN via Tech Lead auto-rule, user confirmed real reviewer is TienND. Fountain excluded from this check entirely per user instruction. Corrected findings: Radio Data Center 2h (KhanhHH) pending LeNH's review; James Diamond 16h (LeNH) pending PhucVT's review; Crystal lang 9h (PhucVT) pending TienND's review (override). None are DuongDN's own action item — ALERT #9 retracted, kept as informational only.

Correction 10:2x Jul-8: LeNH 0h flagged a 3rd time same morning (after already reversing at 09:55 with a 'deep-dive confirmed genuine' claim) — user said 'sai, tôi thấy đã đủ giờ' again. Root cause: per-dev-filtered Workstream fetch silently returned empty for LeNH on 'Portfolio - James Diamond' project despite real data (8h+8h, 07-06/07-07) — same flaky-fetch bug as the long-documented Peptide Clyde incidents, but first time seen on THIS project, proving it's not project-specific. Only found via a fully unfiltered ALL-projects/ALL-members Workstream dump, not by re-running the filtered script N times. 8th recurrence, memory updated both locations with escalated rule: always cross-check via unfiltered dump before calling any LeNH/KhanhHH shortfall genuine.

Correction 09:26 Jul-8: user caught 2 wrongful alerts (Aysar + Maddy 'report missing') for not cross-checking dev hours first — repeat violation of existing feedback_aysar_consolidated/feedback_kai_daily_report_gate memory, both reinforced.
